label: DSG Website
useWhen: Use for public-facing reference, website-policy checks, brand context, and external links.

label: DSG Brand Kit Info
useWhen: Use before drafting public or team-facing communications. Contains DSG voice, tone, mission, colors, typography, positioning, and program identity.

label: DSG Brief Builder
useWhen: Use to create structured DSG briefs, internal updates, task summaries, and review-ready team communications.

label: DSG GPT
useWhen: Use to draft DSG-branded copy, checklist language, prompts, and review notes.

label: Cockpit Action Tracker
useWhen: Use as the master active-task source for cross-department actions, owners, priority, status, evidence, and Hub task IDs.

label: Cockpit Source Inbox
useWhen: Use for intake/source evidence and additive completion write-backs tied to source rows.

label: DSG Share Folder
useWhen: Use as the main shared storage location for team files and final deliverables.

label: Grants Folder
useWhen: Use for grant research, staged funding materials, funder notes, and development-ready documents.

label: July 20 Funding Report
useWhen: Use for current CitizensNYC, Vanguard Voices, Brooklyn Org, D'Addario, in-kind, and approval-gate funding context.

label: DSG Business Plan
useWhen: Use when checking or revising older funder/profile language before external use.

label: Google Business Profile
useWhen: Use only from the approved source account to review failed appeal, verification, public profile, or correction status.

label: Google for Nonprofits
useWhen: Use for nonprofit eligibility, Workspace/Ad Grants review, support-thread follow-up, and approved gap checks.

label: Zeffy
useWhen: Use for registrant lists, campaigns, payment intent, refunds, supporter records, and donation-related records.

label: Relay
useWhen: Use for banking, receipts, payments, settlements, and finance cleanup tasks.

label: Monthly Subscriptions
useWhen: Use for current tool costs, owners, payment paths, subscription decisions, and board/tool-report cleanup.

label: Canva
useWhen: Use for final designed assets, graphics, branded templates, and Canva domain review after approval.

label: Buffer Schedule
useWhen: Use for social scheduling after copy, timing, and assets are reviewed.

label: Manychat Automations
useWhen: Use for Messenger or automation review when a workflow touches chatbot messaging.

label: Meta Business Suite
useWhen: Use for Facebook/Instagram business account management and post review after access is confirmed.

label: DSG Instagram
useWhen: Use for public-facing social reference, brand presence, campaign review, and Instagram content checks.

label: DSG LinkedIn
useWhen: Use for public-facing organizational reference, partner/funder credibility, and LinkedIn content checks.

label: NY Charities Registration
useWhen: Use for New York charities registration, CHAR410/CHAR500, and compliance reference.

label: DSG Compliance Calendar
useWhen: Use for recurring compliance dates, CHAR500 calendarization, and compliance-calendar adoption context.

label: ST-119.2 Packet Folder
useWhen: Use for ST-119.2 packet review after authority and signer/certification path are confirmed.

label: IRS Charities and Nonprofits
useWhen: Use for federal nonprofit compliance reference.

label: IRS StayExempt
useWhen: Use for nonprofit compliance learning and board/admin education.

label: Getting In On the Act
useWhen: Use for participatory arts, audience involvement spectrum, co-creation, and audience-as-artist framing.

label: Making Sense of Audience Engagement
useWhen: Use when developing audience engagement language, program framing, and workshop/post-mortem thinking.
